personal_auto: Alternate Names: Personal Auto, Private Automobile, PAP. Description: Covers automobiles owned or leased by individuals for personal, non-business use. Compulsory coverages for this vary by state/province
homeowners: Alternate Names: Home/House Insurance. Description: Covers home, contents, personal liability, and additional living expenses.
tenant_renters: Alternate Names: Renters Insurance, Tenants Package. Description: Covers personal property, personal liability, and loss of use for individuals renting a residence; includes contents and liability for rented dwellings; includes additional living expenses.
condominium: Alternate Names: Condo Insurance, Condominium Unit Owners. Description: Covers a condominium unit owner’s personal property, interior unit improvements and betterments, personal liability, and loss assessment.
personal_umbrella: Alternate Names: Personal Excess Liability, Umbrella Policy. Description: Provides excess and sometimes broader liability coverage above underlying personal auto, homeowners, or watercraft policies.
general_liability: Alternate Names: Liability Coverage, Liability Insurance. Description: Covers a business’s liability for third-party bodily injury, property damage, and personal and advertising injury arising from premises, operations, products, or completed work.
property: Alternate Names: Building and Property Coverage, Property Damage Insurance. Description: Covers physical business assets such as buildings and business personal property against covered causes of loss, subject to perils, limits, deductibles, and extensions.
business_interruption: Alternate Names: Business Interruption, Extra Expense. Description: Covers loss of income and continuing operating expenses following a covered property loss during the defined period of restoration; may include extra expense coverage.
commercial_auto: Alternate Names: Commercial Auto, Fleet Insurance. Description: Covers liability and physical damage for vehicles owned, leased, hired, or non-owned by a business.
crime: Alternate Names: Fidelity Insurance, Crime Coverage. Description: Covers financial losses caused by employee dishonesty, theft, forgery, funds transfer fraud, and certain computer-related crimes.
equipment_breakdown: Alternate Names: Boiler and Machinery (B&M). Description: Covers sudden and accidental mechanical or electrical breakdown of covered equipment, including boilers, HVAC systems, electrical panels, and production machinery, and may include resulting damage, spoilage, or extra expense by endorsement.
umbrella: Alternate Names: Excess Liability, Umbrella Coverage. Description: Provides excess limits over underlying CGL, Commercial Auto, and Employers Liability policies, and may provide broader coverage where underlying insurance does not apply.
d_and_o: Full Form: Directors and Officers Liability Insurance. Alternate Names: Management Liability, D&O. Description: Covers directors and officers for claims alleging wrongful acts in governance, management decisions, or fiduciary duties; typically written on a claims-made basis.
epli: Full Form: Employment Practices Liability Insurance. Alternate Names: Employment Liability, EPL. Description: Covers claims arising from employment-related acts such as discrimination, harassment, retaliation, wrongful termination, and failure to employ or promote.
fiduciary_liability: Alternate Names: Pension Trust Liability, ERISA Liability. Description: Covers claims alleging breach of fiduciary duty, mismanagement, or errors in the administration of employee benefit plans.
e_and_o: Full Form: Errors and Omissions Insurance. Alternate Names: Professional Services Liability, Malpractice. Description: Covers claims arising from errors, omissions, or negligence in the performance of professional services; typically written on a claims-made basis with a retroactive date.
cyber_liability: Alternate Names: Network Security & Privacy, Data Breach Insurance. Description: Covers cyber incidents including data breaches, ransomware, network security failures, privacy liability, and incident response costs, including first- and third-party losses.
inland_marine: Alternate Names: Equipment Floater, Commercial Inland Marine. Description: Covers contractor’s equipment and property, movable, specialized, or high-value property that may be off-premises, in transit, or at multiple locations.
cargo_insurance: Alternate Names: Ocean Cargo, Freight Insurance. Description: Covers goods in transit by land, sea, or air against loss or damage during shipping, including domestic and international shipments.
builders_risk: Alternate Names: Course of Construction (COC). Description: Covers buildings, materials, and equipment while under construction or renovation against covered physical loss or damage for the duration of the project.
